Non-current assets, not current assets.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; preferred over cash flow presentation.
Subset of cash, not total cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and Cash Equivalents at End of Period
candidates.why: Cash flow ending cash ties to balance-sheet cash, but balance-sheet line is preferred.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of the year/period
candidates.why: Beginning-of-period cash, not the balance-sheet stock at year-end.

candidates.row_label: Net increase/(decrease) in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Flow, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet total cash line rather than unrestricted cash subset or cash-flow equivalents.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

Balancing line, not LCT.

No non-lease short-term debt/current borrowings line is identifiable. Available current debt-like lines are lease-related ('Current lease liabilities', 'Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year'), which are excluded by the baseline STD definition.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable line on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liability.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet proxy for total property, plant and equipment/tangible fixed assets; preferred over component gross/accumulated lines and cash-flow items.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Only a lease-related gross component, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation line, not PPE asset balance.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/net line for lease-related tangible assets only, not total PPE.
Balancing line rather than the clean reported total.

candidates.row_label: Purchase of Property, Plant and Equipment
candidates.why: Capital expenditure flow, not the PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Expense flow, not the PPE stock.
Intangibles are not PPE.

variables.notes: Using 'Total Tangible Assets' as the best available balance-sheet total for PPE/tangible fixed assets under IFRS.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Exact balance-sheet total assets line selected.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities

variables.notes: Chose the exact operating cash flow total from the cash flow statement, outside the shortlist but clearly identifiable.
